gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/176)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/176)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ شَيْ‏ءٍ مِنَ الْفَرَائِضِ فَقَالَ لِي أَ لَا أُخْرِجُ لَكَ كِتَابَ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) فَقُلْتُ كِتَابُ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) لَمْ يُدْرَسْ فَقَالَ يَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ إِنَّ كِتَابَ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) لَمْ يُدْرَسْ فَأَخْرَجَهُ فَإِذَا كِتَابٌ جَلِيلٌ وَ إِذَا فِيهِ رَجُلٌ مَاتَ وَ تَرَكَ عَمَّهُ وَ خَالَهُ قَالَ لِلْعَمِّ الثُّلُثَانِ وَ لِلْخَالِ الثُّلُثُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad and Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father and Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad, all of them from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Ali Bin Raib, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about something from the Obligations (legislated shares of inheritance), so he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Shall I<sup>asws</sup> bring out for you a Book of Ali<sup>asws</sup>?’ So I<sup>asws</sup> said, ‘The Book of Ali<sup>asws</sup> is not studied’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Abu Muhammad! The Book of Ali<sup>asws</sup> is not studied?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> brought it out, and it was a splendid Book, and therein was, a man who died and left his paternal uncle and his maternal uncle. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For the paternal uncle is two-thirds and for the maternal uncle is the one-third’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad and Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Yahya from Ahmad ibn Muhammad and Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father and Humayd ibn Ziyad from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad all of them from ibn Mahbub from Ali ibn Ri’ab from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about certain issues of ordained shares of inheritance. He (the Imam) said, ’Do you like if I show you the book of Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam ?’ I said, ‘But the book of Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, is no longer studied.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘O abu Muhammad, how can you say that the book of Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, is no longer studied?’ He (the Imam) brought it out and it was a magnificent book. I saw in it this case, ‘A man dies and leaves behind his paternal and maternal uncles.’ It said, ‘The paternal uncle receives two-thirds and the maternal uncle receives one- third.’”
